title: Optimal Pegasus
description: Optimal Performace, Quality of Life changes and Aesthetics in one Modpack!
body:
# Welcome to Optimal Pegasus!

This modpack brings performance, handy quality-of-life changes, and visual improvements together! Targeted at the general player, new features are added to improve the experience without being too simple or too overwhelming. If you experience an issue or have a suggestion for this modpack, feel free to let me know on my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/YPgxKKb2Mr)!

## Features
- Optimization using performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and many more!
- Shader support
- Hand restocking and Inventory sorting
- Saturation level added to the hunger bar
- Minimap and World map

### Mods from Curseforge:

[Malilib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malilib)

[Tweakeroo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tweakeroo)

[Item Scroller (Original)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-scroller) → The 1.20.1 versions of this modpack use a forked version of the original Item Scroller called [Item Scroller Crafting Fix](https://github.com/Andrews54757/itemscroller-crafting-fix)
